nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Rufous-bellied kookaburra
nodes.summary: Rufous-bellied kookaburra（Rufous-bellied kookaburra，学名 Dacelo gaudichaud），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，常见栖息地包括热带雨林。

nodes.name: 热带雨林
nodes.summary: 结构复杂且冠层完整的高生物多样性森林。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Rufous-bellied kookaburras can be found in the middle story of the tropical rainforest, where they fly out directly and swiftly from their perch to seize large insects from trees. Despite their direct flight, rufous-bellied kookaburras are capable of very sharp twists and turns around the dense trees that form their habitat
